description: Phase 10 — Cocoindex Code-Only Patterns. Removed .md/.mdx/.txt/.rst from both .cocoindex_code/settings.yml and cocoindex_code/settings.py DEFAULT_INCLUDED_PATTERNS. Cocoindex is now a pure code-search index; documentation retrieval routes to spec-kit-memory. Pre-change index had 142,237 chunks (45% markdown, dominated by 4-runtime skill mirror). Clean rebuild in flight under the new patterns.
